notes: The monnify adaptor exposes only generic get/list/post/request helpers, so this OpenAPI 3.0.3 was authored from the Monnify developer docs to cover the common endpoints those helpers target: auth login, transaction search, reserved accounts, and single disbursement transfers. Base URL is the sandbox host (https://sandbox.monnify.com; live is https://api.monnify.com). All responses use Monnify's standard envelope (requestSuccessful/responseMessage/responseCode/responseBody) modelled via MonnifyEnvelope + allOf. Focused subset of a larger API.
